title: Citrus SMP
body:
Modpack for the Citrus SMP. It contains various mods for the new season - a Superhero City. These mods allow players to gain various superpowers, via genetics, symbiotes, suits, and more.



Current superhero mods include:

Arrzee's Multiverse Pack

FSang18's Heropack

Alien Evolution



There are also other mods like Create and Naturalist to add to the overall playing experience.
